name: Sesame Chicken and Snow Peas in Apricot Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup dried apricot halves (2 oz./60 g)
1/2 pound snow peas (250 g), ends trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large nonstick frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the chicken and sauté until browned and no longer pink in the center, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the sesame seeds and sauté, stirring frequently, until browned, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the apricots, water, apricot preserves, soy sauce, mustard, and ginger; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Add the snow peas and simmer until tender-crisp, about 5 more minutes.
8. Divide among 4 individual plates.
